content.text:
<user_query>
Fix 4 issues in the Playwright integration test file at `/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/tests/integration/workspace-new.spec.ts`. Read the file first before making any changes.

## Issue P2-2: Replace `waitForTimeout(3000)` with explicit UI wait

The `gotoWorkspaceNew` helper function currently has:

```typescript
async function gotoWorkspaceNew(page: Page) {
  await page.goto("/workspace/new", { waitUntil: "networkidle" });
  if (!process.env.CI) {
    await page.waitForTimeout(3000);
  }
}
```

## Issue P2-3: Remove `waitUntil: "networkidle"` 

`networkidle` is fragile for SPAs with HMR/WebSockets. The existing `homepage.spec.ts` uses plain `page.goto("/")` without this.

## Fix for P2-2 + P2-3 combined

Replace the entire `gotoWorkspaceNew` function with:

```typescript
async function gotoWorkspaceNew(page: Page) {
  await page.goto("/workspace/new");
  await expect(page.getByRole("heading", { name: "Create your workspace" })).toBeVisible();
}
```

This requires importing `expect` — it should already be imported from `./test-fixture`. Verify the import line includes `expect`.

## Issue P2-4: Add a test for the failure path

There's no test that verifies error handling when workspace creation fails. Add a new test at the END of the file:

```typescript
test("shows an error when workspace creation fails", async ({
  page,
  mockServerRequest,
}) => {
  await mockServerRequest.GET(usersApiPattern, { body: mockUser });
  await mockServerRequest.GET(tenantsApiPattern, { body: [] });

  await gotoWorkspaceNew(page);

  await typeWorkspaceName(page, "Bad Workspace");

  await mockServerRequest.POST(tenantsApiPattern, {
    status: 500,
    body: { error: "Internal Server Error" },
  });

  await page.getByRole("button", { name: "Create workspace" }).click();

  await expect(
    page.getByText("Could not create your workspace. Please try again."),
  ).toBeVisible();
});
```

## Issue P2-5: Fix hard-coded `localhost:3210` in URL assertions

Both existing tests have:
```typescript
await expect(page).toHaveURL(/^http:\/\/localhost:3210\/?$/);
```

Replace BOTH occurrences with a path-only check:
```typescript
await expect(page).toHaveURL("/");
```

Playwright's `toHaveURL` with a string checks that the URL path matches when `baseURL` is configured, which is the case here. Using a simple string "/" is the idiomatic approach.

## Important rules
- Read the file first
- Make all 4 changes
- Do NOT change the `typeWorkspaceName` helper or the mock data constants
- The `expect` import should already exist from `./test-fixture` — verify before adding a duplicate
- For React forms, the project uses `SubmitEvent<HTMLFormElement>` not `FormEvent`
- Use string literals, not string concatenation
</user_query>

Diagnosing: the error snapshot shows the textbox contains "Hope Foundation" while "Create workspace" stays disabled — `disabled={isCreating || !name.trim()}` indicates React `name` state didn't update. `keyboard.insertText` updates the DOM but doesn't reliably sync this controlled input.
